description: Table function that reads data from an ADBC database given a connection profile URI and a SQL query. Ideal for explicit predicate and projection pushdown to remote engines.
Execute arbitrary SQL commands and operations on a remote system via ADBC.
comment: Returns a boolean column named Success set to true on successful execution.

description: Clear locally cached schema and table metadata from all attached ADBC databases.
comment: Call this after a remote schema change to ensure DuckDB sees the latest metadata.
